message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic across widgets, charts, canvas, and demo screens

Comprehensive pass replacing bare u16 arithmetic with saturating_add/saturating_sub
in coordinate calculations to prevent overflow/wrapping at extreme terminal
positions. Fixes 50+ overflow-prone patterns across 17 widget/extras files.

Also fixes pre-existing build errors from concurrent agents:
- TreeNode API migration in file_browser.rs (removed generics, leaf fn)
- Spinner API migration in advanced_features.rs (StatefulWidget)
- PackedRgba::ZERO → TRANSPARENT in data_viz.rs
- Clippy collapsible_if and redundant_closure lints across demo screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -274,7 +274,7 @@ impl Traceback {
                     if is_error_line {
                         draw_styled_char(
                             &mut frame.buffer,
-                            area.x + 1,
+                            area.x.saturating_add(1),
                             y,
                             '❱',
                             self.style.indicator,

@@ -370,7 +370,7 @@ fn render_row(row: &Row, col_rects: &[Rect], frame: &mut Frame, y: u16, style: S
                 x = crate::draw_text_span_with_link(
                     frame,
                     x,
-                    cell_area.y + line_idx as u16,
+                    cell_area.y.saturating_add(line_idx as u16),
                     &span.content,
                     span_style,
                     cell_area.right(),
